allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from agents.echo.server import app; print\(''Import OK:'', app.title\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "
from agents.echo.graph import build_echo_graph
g = build_echo_graph\(\)
dg = g.get_graph\(\)
print\('Nodes:'\)
for n in dg.nodes:
    print\(f'  id={n.id!r} name={n.name!r}'\)
print\('Edges:'\)
for e in dg.edges:
    print\(f'  source={e.source!r} target={e.target!r}'\)
" 2>&1)
